scripts.deploy:auto: powershell -Command "do { Write-Host 'Waiting for node...'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } until ((Test-NetConnection localhost -Port 8545).TcpTestSucceeded); npm run deploy:local"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "NODE,DEPLOY,BACK,FRONT" -c "yellow,blue,green,magenta" "npm run node:contracts" "npm run deploy:auto" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
